turns.content: What brings you in today?
My wife, she say come. There is a spot on my head. It's fine, not too bad.
When did this start?
Uh... maybe last year? A long time. Not sure. It's fine.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
No pain. Just here. (points to forehead) Feels rough. A little dry. But it's fine.
Have you had any fever or chills?
Huh? Fever? No. I feel fine. No sick. Just the rough spot.
What medications are you currently taking?
What? Medications? No pills. I don't take nothing. I'm healthy.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
What mean... chronic? I don't know. No problems. I work every day. I am strong.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Allergic? What is that? I don't know. No bad from medicine. I don't take any.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I put some cream... from shop. For dry skin. Didn't help. No matter. It's fine.
Does anything make it better or worse?
No. Sun, rain, work... same. No change. Nothing bad. Nothing good. It's just there.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's fine. I work same. No change. Just... my wife, she talk too much about it. (shrugs) That's all.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No. Never smoke. Drink? Sometimes a little. With friends. Not much.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Family? My father... he had skin problems too. But he old. I don't know. Maybe. Not sure.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. First time. Before my skin is good. This is new. But it's small.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
What? No. I don't understand. Big words. Can you say again, but easy?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically? Maybe 1. Very small. Emotionally? Not bad. Maybe 2. Not worried.
Do you have any questions for me?
Is it bad? My wife wants to know. Me, I don't worry.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. Maybe nothing. Just old skin? From sun? I work outside. That's all.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That is all. Just the spot. I think we finish?
